floors.name: The Quarry Catacombs
floors.intel: Stone guardians rule this floor. Their skin shrugs off direct blasts — DoTs and bleeds from the forge will find cracks.
floors.pressure_note: Enemies resistant to direct damage. Craft Rotbloom or Ember Hemorrhage.

rooms.name: Forsaken Threshold
rooms.description: You stand at the mouth of the catacombs. Wet moss claims the stones. A bone-dry wind carries distant laughter.

rooms.name: Rat Warren
rooms.description: Squeaking echoes from every corner. Yellow eyes blink in the dark.

rooms.name: The Old Runesmithy
rooms.description: A cold forge. Runes glow faintly in the ash, still hungry. Someone died here studying them.

rooms.name: Votive Chamber
rooms.description: A mouldering shrine. Candle stubs in a ring around a stone basin full of dark water.

rooms.name: Banked Embers
rooms.description: A cramped alcove where a traveler once slept. The embers still give heat.

rooms.name: Quarry Hall
rooms.description: A vaulted hall cut from living stone. Something slab-shouldered and slow stirs among the pillars.

rooms.name: Sealed Antechamber
rooms.description: Two golems flank a sealed door. Air hums with warding magic.

rooms.name: Gate of the First Warden
rooms.description: A colossal figure of hammered stone unfolds from the wall, eyes igniting with slow malice.

floors.name: The Witchwood Descent
floors.intel: Living thorns and hungry mana below. Direct magic rebounds from the Thornlord's grove. Forge hexes and DoTs.
floors.pressure_note: Enemies reflect direct damage or drain mana. Consider Hexroot, Rotbloom.

rooms.name: Root Entry
rooms.description: Tree-roots have cracked the stone. The air smells of sap and old blood.

rooms.name: Thicket Grove
rooms.description: Gnarled saplings twist toward you, eyes opening in their bark.

rooms.name: Druid's Altar
rooms.description: An altar of living wood. It drinks mana and weeps resin that hums to the touch.

rooms.name: Mana Haze
rooms.description: A sickly aura chokes your spellcraft. Something wreathed in light hangs in the air.

rooms.name: Grove Rest
rooms.description: A hollow lined with soft moss. The altar's hum lulls your aches.

rooms.name: Hex-Ringed Glade
rooms.description: Two thornwretches stand back-to-back in a glowing ring of warding runes.

rooms.name: Throne of the Thornlord
rooms.description: A face in the wall of the tree, mouth full of iron. It opens.

votive_f1.title: The Votive Basin
votive_f1.story: The water is cold enough to hurt. Something glints at the bottom — a rune? A coin? Your reflection doesn't look back at you.

effect.toast: You pull out a shadow rune and a handful of crystals.
